section_name: Cooperation of State Agencies, Officers, and Employees
text:
On the governor’s request, a state agency or institution, state officer, or state employee shall cooperate in an activity of the state that is consistent with:

(1) this chapter; and

(2) the agency’s, institution’s, officer’s, or employee’s official functions.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 723. Tex. Traffic Safety Act
##### § 723.014 — Cooperation of State Agencies, Officers, and Employees

On the governor’s request, a state agency or institution, state officer, or state employee shall cooperate in an activity of the state that is consistent with:

    (1) this chapter; and

    (2) the agency’s, institution’s, officer’s, or employee’s official functions.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: On the governor’s request, a state agency or institution, state officer, or state employee shall cooperate in an activity of the state that is consistent with:
the agency’s, institution’s, officer’s, or employee’s official functions.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
